founder_linkedin_profile.name: Justin Phillips
founder_linkedin_profile.headline: Helping parents & schools build healthier digital childhoods | Founder, Guided Childhood | TRUST Framework
founder_linkedin_profile.note: Growing fast — Wrong Villain series driving reach. Use this as a social proof hook in outreach.

outreach_hooks_to_use: Wrong Villain series — 59K impressions on latest post. Reference this to establish credibility.
β = 0.061 finding — 46 studies, 79 effect sizes. DSLs and evidence-informed heads will respond to this.
UK data specific: mental health acceleration started 2008 not 2012 — relevant to schools who have invested in phone bans
258 educators saved the last post — 'fellow DSLs are saving this' is a social proof hook
target_roles_that_respond: Designated Safeguarding Lead (DSL) — highest relevance, cite safeguarding angle
PSHE Lead — strong fit for digital literacy content and the Wrong Villain evidence
Deputy Headteacher — decision-maker, cite 59K impressions as credibility signal
MAT Safeguarding Lead — multiplier reach, cite the effect size data
notes_to_self: Justin has 7,828 followers and 71K weekly impressions. Use this as social proof in outreach — 'I write about digital childhood for 7,800 educators' is a credibility hook. The Wrong Villain series is a conversation starter: 'have you seen the β = 0.061 finding?' will land with evidence-informed DSLs.
